food-chicken-breast.name: Csirkemell
food-chicken-breast.comment:
FDC Measure: 1 piece = 174.0 gram (#121343 10/20/2012)
Properties are based on skinless, boneless, meat only, cooked, braised

food-chicken-thigh.name: Csirkecomb
food-chicken-thigh.comment: Properties based on meat only, cooked, braised

food-chicken-drumstick.name: Csirke alsócomb
food-chicken-drumstick.comment:
FDC Measure: 1 drumstick = 104.0 gram (#121309 5/1/2010)
Properties based on meat only, cooked, braised

food-chicken-wing.name: Csirkeszárny
food-chicken-wing.comment: Properties based on meat only, cooked, roasted

food-tahini.name: Tahini
food-tahini.comment: Seeds, sesame butter, tahini, from roasted and toasted kernels (most common type)

food-olives-black.name: Fekete olívabogyók
food-olives-black.comment: black and purple (Kalamata) olives - unclear from FDC whether pitted or not

food-onions-red.name: Lilahagyma
food-onions-red.comment:
FDC Measure: 1 Onion = 197.0 gram (#234609 11/26/2019)
see https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Red_onion

food-eggplant-raw.name: Padlizsán
food-eggplant-raw.comment: raw eggplant from SR Legacy Foods

food-soy-sauce.name: Szójaszósz
food-soy-sauce.comment: Soy sauce made from soy (tamari) japanese version (shoyu) is different

food-scallions.name: Újhagyma
food-scallions.comment: Onions, spring or scallions (includes tops and bulb), raw

food-milk-lowfat.name: Tej (1,5%)
food-milk-lowfat.comment:
FDC Measure: 1 cup = 246.0 gram (#187514 4/16/2018)
lowfat, fluid, 1% milkfat

food-milk-nonfat.name: Tej (0,1%)
food-milk-nonfat.comment:
FDC Measure: 1 cup = 246.0 gram (#187522 4/16/2018)
nonfat, fluid

food-milk-reduced-fat.name: Tej (2,8%)
food-milk-reduced-fat.comment:
FDC Measure: 1 cup = 245.0 gram (#187524 4/16/2018)
fluid, 2% milkfat

food-white-beans-from-canned-no-added-fa.name: Fehér bab
food-white-beans-from-canned-no-added-fa.comment: Navy Beans, Cannellini Beans, Great Northern Beans

food-garam-masala.name: Garam Masala
food-garam-masala.comment: This is a spice mix from the brand MDH

food-date-dried.name: Szárított datolya
food-date-dried.comment: Dried dates are in the tap Survey Foods only (2023/06/25)

food-cheese-swiss.name: Ementáli sajt
food-cheese-swiss.comment: Jarlsburg, Sweitzer, Danbo, Emmentaler, Samsoe, Sapsago

food-canned-coconut-milk.name: Kókusztej
food-canned-coconut-milk.comment: The canned stuff used for cooking, not the beverage or non-dairy milk

food-coconut-milk.name: Kókuszital
food-coconut-milk.comment: The beverage or non-dairy milk, not the canned stuff used for cooking

category-bakery.name: Pékség
category-bakery.comment: Baked goods such as bread, toast, muffins.

category-frozen.name: Fagyasztott
category-frozen.comment: All frozen food including pre-made and ice cream.

category-canned.name: Konzerv
category-canned.comment: All canned foods including vegetables, fruits and pre-made foods.

category-sweets.name: Édességek
category-sweets.comment: All kinds of sweets, biscuits, chocolate, ...

category-coffee.name: Kávé és Tea
category-coffee.comment: All kinds of coffee and tea products

category-baking.name: Sütés
category-baking.comment: Products used in baking like flour, sugar, baking powder.

category-meat.name: Hús
category-meat.comment: Fresh meat such as ground beef, steak, chicken.

category-cereal.name: Gabona
category-cereal.comment: All types of cereal including müsli and oatmeal.

category-alcohol.name: Alkohol
category-alcohol.comment: For beer, wine and liquors used in cooking or baking.

category-condiments-sauces.name: Szószok
category-condiments-sauces.comment: All condiments such as ketchup, mayo, mustard. Also includes sauces such as pesto rosso.

category-dairy.name: Tejtermék
category-dairy.comment: All milk products like milk, yoghurt, butter. But not cheese.

category-oil-vinegar.name: Olaj és Ecet
category-oil-vinegar.comment: Includes all the different types of oils and vinegars.

category-produce.name: Zöldség és Gyümölcs
category-produce.comment: Vegetables and fruits. Could be split into those categories.

category-deli.name: Készételek
category-deli.comment: Cold cuts (of meat products such as sausage)

category-cheese.name: Sajt
category-cheese.comment: Different kinds of cheeses such as parmigiano, mozzarella, or cheddar. Also includes grated cheeses.

category-herbs-spices.name: Fűszerek
category-herbs-spices.comment: Dried herbs and spices. Could include salt.

store-meijer.name: Meijer
store-meijer.comment: A big-box store common in the midwestern United States.

store-colruyt.name: Colruyt
store-colruyt.comment: Colruyt (Dutch pronunciation: [kɔlˈrœyt]) is a Belgian supermarket chain. (Wikipedia)

conversion-tahini.source: Green Tahini Sauce from "Simple" by Y. Ottolenghi

conversion-canned-coconut-milk.comment: the canned stuff used for cooking, not the beverage or non-dairy milk
